name: YSL Myself
description: A statement of modern masculinity. A woody floral fragrance that is both fresh and sensual, capturing the essence of the contemporary man.
recommendation: Perfect for the modern man who values both strength and sensitivity. Ideal for evening wear and special occasions.

name: Bvlgari Men in Black
description: An intense composition of amber, leather, spices and wood. It opens with accords of natural rum and luminous spices.
recommendation: A bold choice for the confident man. Best suited for cooler weather and formal evening events.

name: Club de Nuit Intense
description: A provocative woody spicy masculine fragrance that opens with fresh fruity notes of lemon, apple and blackcurrant.
recommendation: An excellent everyday scent for the active man. Great for office wear and casual outings.

name: Layton
description: A noble fragrance with a powerful and refined trail. A signature scent that embodies the spirit of the 18th century.
recommendation: A luxurious choice for those who appreciate classic elegance with a modern twist. Perfect for high-profile events.

name: Sauvage
description: A radically fresh composition, dictated by a name that has the ring of a manifesto.
recommendation: The ultimate versatile fragrance. Suitable for any occasion, from the gym to a black-tie gala.

name: Bloom
description: Capturing the spirit of the contemporary, diverse and authentic women of Gucci.
recommendation: A beautiful floral scent for the romantic woman. Ideal for daytime wear and spring/summer seasons.

name: Black Orchid
description: A luxurious and sensual fragrance of rich, dark accords and an alluring potion of black orchids and spice.
recommendation: A mysterious and seductive scent. Best for those who want to make a lasting impression at night.

name: Aventus
description: The most popular fragrance ever created in the history of The House of Creed.
recommendation: A powerful scent for the leader. Perfect for business meetings and making a strong first impression.

name: Libre
description: The fragrance of freedom, a grand-floral fragrance with an unequivocal YSL twist.
recommendation: For the independent and bold woman. Great for both professional settings and evening social events.

name: Baccarat Rouge 540
description: Luminous and sophisticated, Baccarat Rouge 540 lays on the skin like an amber, floral and woody breeze.
recommendation: A true masterpiece of modern perfumery. Best for those who want a unique, long-lasting signature scent.

name: Eros
description: Love, passion, beauty and desire are the key concepts of the new men's fragrance by Versace.
recommendation: A vibrant and energetic scent. Perfect for clubbing, parties, and youthful social gatherings.

name: Good Girl
description: It's so good to be bad. Good Girl is a sensual, evocative fragrance born of the beautiful contradictions.
recommendation: A sophisticated and playful scent. Ideal for date nights and evening events where you want to shine.

name: Bleu de Chanel
description: A tribute to masculine freedom in an aromatic-woody fragrance with a captivating trail.
recommendation: The gold standard for a professional masculine scent. Perfect for the office and formal daytime events.

name: Si
description: Chic, sultry, intense and soft at the same time, Si is a chypre fragrance reinvented.
recommendation: An elegant and modern scent for the sophisticated woman. Great for everyday luxury and special occasions.

name: Oud Wood
description: One of the most rare, precious, and expensive ingredients in a perfumer's arsenal, oud wood is often burned in incense-filled temples.
recommendation: A deep, smoky, and exotic scent. Best for connoisseurs and those who appreciate complex, woody fragrances.

name: La Vie Est Belle
description: A universal declaration to the beauty of life. A unique olfactory signature perfume scent.
recommendation: A joyful and sweet fragrance. Perfect for the woman who radiates positivity and grace.

name: Invictus
description: The scent of victory, the essence of heroes. A daring smash-up of freshness and heat.
recommendation: A fresh and aquatic scent for the competitive man. Ideal for sports, casual wear, and daytime activities.

name: Black Opium
description: A glam rock fragrance full of mystery and energy. An addictive gourmand floral.
recommendation: An addictive and energetic scent. Perfect for the woman who loves the nightlife and making a statement.

name: The Most Wanted
description: A powerful and seductive fragrance for the man who dares to be himself.
recommendation: A warm and inviting scent. Excellent for dates and evening social gatherings in cooler weather.

name: J'adore
description: An iconic fragrance, J'adore Eau de Parfum is the grand feminine floral by the House of Dior.
recommendation: A timeless floral masterpiece. Best for formal events and when you want to feel exceptionally feminine.

name: Stronger With You
description: A fragrance that lives in the present, molded by the energy of modernity.
recommendation: A warm and modern masculine scent. Great for everyday wear and casual social events.

name: Coco Mademoiselle
description: The essence of a free and bold woman. A feminine oriental fragrance with a strong personality.
recommendation: A sophisticated and long-lasting scent. Perfect for the professional woman who wants to exude confidence.

name: Light Blue
description: A colorful, fresh, floral fruity fragrance that reflects the sexiness of the Mediterranean lifestyle.
recommendation: The perfect summer fragrance. Light, fresh, and ideal for beach days and casual outings.

name: 1 Million
description: The scent of success. Going for gold because decadence is thrilling.
recommendation: A bold and attention-grabbing scent. Best for parties and when you want to stand out in a crowd.

name: Flowerbomb
description: An explosive floral bouquet. Unexpected. The essence of thousands of flowers.
recommendation: A sweet and powerful floral scent. Ideal for the woman who loves a rich, blooming fragrance.

name: Acqua di Gio
description: A resolutely masculine fragrance born from the sea, the sun, the earth, and the breeze of a Mediterranean island.
recommendation: A classic fresh scent. Perfect for daytime wear, especially in warm weather.

name: Alien
description: A solar fragrance, a radiant and mysterious scent that awakens emotions.
recommendation: A unique and powerful scent for the woman who isn't afraid to be different. Best for evening wear.

name: Spicebomb Extreme
description: An even more explosive and intense version of the original Spicebomb.
recommendation: A warm, spicy, and masculine scent. Perfect for winter and making a bold statement.

name: Delina
description: A floral explosion of Turkish rose, lily of the valley and peony mixed with the rounded tangy notes of lychee, rhubarb and bergamot.
recommendation: A luxurious and ultra-feminine scent. Ideal for the woman who appreciates high-end, niche perfumery.

name: Tobacco Vanille
description: A modern take on an old-world men's club. A smooth Oriental fragrance.
recommendation: A rich, warm, and comforting scent. Best for cold weather and cozy evening gatherings.
